description: QM-AI workflow: persist state timestamp on session end and remind about unsaved outputs

hooks.prompt: The workflow state file .qm-ai/state.json should have been refreshed on disk (updated_at). If it does not exist yet, no action needed. Remind the user if critical phase outputs (spec/design/task) were mentioned in this session but may not be saved to requirement/. Suggest running /qm-ai:status next session.
